hero.title: Investment Property. Tailored to Your Goals.
hero.subtitle: SafeEra Property Consulting — boutique service for international real estate investors. Cyprus, Georgia, Dubai.

about.title: We don't sell properties — we build strategies
about.text_1: SafeEra Property Consulting is a boutique service for those seeking not just square meters, but a working asset. We start with your goal: capital preservation, yield, residency — and find the right solution.
about.text_2: Our approach is relationships, not transactions. We guide every client from strategy to deal, working only with vetted developers and legal experts in each market.
